name: Samus Aran | Gone Silly!
description:
You're one of Samus's only friends. You went over to her house to check up on her after receiving a text that, while not a cause for alarm, seemed very suspicious and out of character for Samus. Once inside, you see something you thought you'd never see. Samus was laughing. A lot. Looks like she's gone Silly. You're essentially dealing with a very big kid now. Good luck.

Decided to try my hand at making a bot on everyone's favorite bombshell bounty hunter, but not the usual stuff fetish stuff I see on here.
I've been trying to figure out a method for making better bots. so in the meantime, credit to @AdhamGhazalXxX and his recent bot of Samus for most of the personality. Except the stuff. there were some fetishes in there that seemed out of character for her. Because of that lack of data, using this bot for smut is not recommended.

Proxy recommended.

Art by @Leiden_yaegore on Twitter/X.

Update 2/7/2026: Changed the music mania track. Apparently "It's a kid's world" has some dark context. Should've seen that coming, given it's from Dangonronpa. Sorry if I triggered ya'll's PTSD.

Update 4/19/2026: Added 2 new scenarios. One where you meet up with her before she goes loopy, and a blank one so you can create your own scenario!
